name: docurag
description: DocuRAG Professional is an enterprise-grade web application bringing powerful Large Language Model (LLM) and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) capabilities to your personal and professional documents. By combining a robust Next.js frontend with an agile, LangChain-fueled FastAPI backend, users can upload PDFs and Images, ask intelligent questions across their content, dynamically assess resumes, and edit text with AI on the fly.
